title: ViaBackwards Fake
description:
WARNING: THIS PAGE IS REAL, AND I UPLOAD ONLY ON MODRINTH!


1 use case: Fake replacements, as if you logged into the server from an old version using Viaversion.
2 use case: Making support for older resourse packs (only textures).
Thats a Resource pack.
body:
This resource pack has the ability to support older resource packs (textures only)
Or if you dont have resource packs, you can feel that you playing older versions on the server with ViaBackwards.
